label: Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling

node.label: Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling
node.definition: Resolution and receptive field are changed by grouping, subsampling, or reconstructing spatial units.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling is modeled as depending on Images, video & spatial grids, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors and feeding downstream nodes such as U-Nets & encoder–decoder convnets, Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models.
examples: atlas downstream link to U-Nets & encoder–decoder convnets
atlas downstream link to Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Images, video & spatial grids, Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling has a `uses` dependency on Images, video & spatial grids because Images, video & spatial grids is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling has a `uses` dependency on Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors because Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
Striding, pooling, patchification & up/downsampling is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Convolution & local filters.
